Wait, but the left square can move through black cells. So maybe the right square can also move through black cells, but it's blocked for some other reason.

But the right square can't move from rows 39-43 to rows 34-38 (orange cells). This is strange - the right square is blocked by orange cells, not black cells.
Hmm, maybe the issue is that the right square's chamber is different. Let me look at the right side again:

- Rows 29-38: `OOOOOOOOOBBBBBO` - orange at cols 40-48, black at cols 49-53
- Rows 39-43: `OOOOSSSSSBBBBBO` - orange at cols 40-43, square at cols 44-48, black at cols 49-53

If the right square moves up, it would go to rows 34-38, cols 44-48 (orange). But the square can't move up.
Wait, but earlier the right square WAS at rows 44-48, and pressing UP moved it to rows 39-43. Then pressing UP again did nothing (blocked at rows 39-43).
So the right square can move from rows 44-48 to rows 39-43, but not from rows 39-43 to rows 34-38.
But the left square CAN move from rows 34-38 to rows 29-33, and from rows 29-33 to rows 24-28, etc.

Maybe the right square's chamber has a "slot" at rows 39-43, and the open space at rows 29-38 is just background (not a valid position for the square).
